title: SpiceJet launches special flights from Fujairah in UAE to India to help stranded travellers amid Iran vs US-Israel war
summary_full: Amidst Iran vs US-Israel war travel chaos, SpiceJet launched special flights from Fujairah in UAE to India, aiding hundreds stranded by regional tensions. This move highlights the vital India-Gulf air corridor's resilience and airlines' swift adaptation to geopolitical crises. The emergency services, utilising Fujairah as a less congested hub, are crucial in clearing travel backlogs and reconnecting the regions.
